english: Machine Learning in Natural Language Processing
desired_chinese: 自然语言处理中的机器学习

english: This paper presents a comprehensive study on machine learning in NLP and educational research contexts.
desired_chinese: 本文在自然语言处理和教育研究的背景下，对机器学习进行了全面研究。

english: Recent transformer-based architectures demonstrate strong performance improvements in semantic understanding, contextual retrieval, and reasoning-heavy tasks.
desired_chinese: 最近基于变换器的架构在语义理解、上下文检索和推理密集型任务中显示出强大的性能提升。

english: Self-regulated learning in technology-enhanced environments remains a promising area for integrating AI support with pedagogical frameworks.
desired_chinese: 在技术增强的环境中自我调节学习仍然是整合AI支持与教学框架的有前景的领域。

english: Experiments were conducted on a benchmark dataset with cross-validation and ablation analysis to quantify model behavior.
desired_chinese: 在基准数据集上进行了实验，使用交叉验证和消融分析来量化模型行为。

english: Results indicate better generalization, stronger retrieval precision, and improved explanatory consistency compared with baselines.
desired_chinese: 结果表明与基线相比，泛化能力更好，检索精度更高，解释一致性有所提高。

english: Future work should focus on explainability and practical integration in educational workflows.
desired_chinese: 未来的工作应集中在可解释性和在教育工作流中的实际集成。

english: e.g., Knowledge workers retain ideas better with atomic note granularity.
desired_chinese: 例如，知识工作者以原子笔记的粒度更好地保留想法。

desired_chinese: Markdown编辑器占位符：如有需要，稍后用富编辑器替换。

english: Generate ideas freely without judgment. Write down every thought related to your research topic. Quantity over quality at this stage.
desired_chinese: 自由发挥想法，不受评判。记录与你的研究主题相关的每一个想法。在这个阶段，数量比质量更重要。
在之前的想法上进行扩展

english: Create organized lists of key concepts, arguments, evidence, and questions. Group related items together.
desired_chinese: 创建有序的关键概念、论点、证据和问题列表。将相关项目组合在一起。

english: Start with a central concept and branch out to related ideas. Draw connections between clusters to find unexpected relationships.
desired_chinese: 从中心概念开始，扩展到相关的想法。在集群之间绘制连接，以发现意想不到的关系。

english: Write continuously for a set period without stopping. Don't worry about grammar, spelling, or structure. Let your thoughts flow.
desired_chinese: 连续写作一段设定的时间，不停止。不要担心语法、拼写或结构。让思想流动。
自由地跟随偏离主题的想法
把所有想法都倾倒在这里...

desired_chinese: 升级为高级版以解锁团队访问权限和更高的产集限制。

desired_chinese: 免费账户最多可以将2个社区产集添加到我的产集中。升级为高级版可以添加更多产集并解锁团队功能。

english: Define research intent and generate purpose cards that drive your reading decisions.
desired_chinese: 定义研究意图并生成推动您阅读决策的目的卡片片。

english: Track search logs, keywords, and candidate papers with reusable search strategies.
desired_chinese: 跟踪检索日志、关键词和候选论文，使用可重用的搜索策略。

english: Build knowledge assets with PDF reading, highlights, literature notes, and permanent notes.
desired_chinese: 通过PDF阅读、高亮、文献笔记和永久笔记构建知识资产。

english: Expand your pool through citation trails and thematic relations for systematic coverage.
desired_chinese: 通过引用线索和主题关系扩展您的资源库，以实现系统性覆盖。

english: Visualize concept maps and evidence structures to spot meaningful research gaps.
desired_chinese: 通过概念图和证据结构可视化，以发现有意义的研究空白。

english: Convert notes and artifacts into structured writing blocks and paper drafts.
desired_chinese: 将笔记和产件转换为结构化的写作块和论文草稿。

english: Keep purpose cards, search logs, notes, concepts, and drafts in one place so research artifacts stay connected instead of scattered.
desired_chinese: 将目的卡片片、检索日志、笔记、概念和草稿放在一个地方，以便研究产件保持连接而不是分散。

english: Bundle high-value artifacts into reusable packages for personal libraries, cross-project reuse, and faster knowledge transfer.
desired_chinese: 将高价值的产件打产集成可重复使用的产集，用于个人图书馆、跨项目重用和加快知识转移。

english: Explore community-shared packages, learn from other researchers' structured outputs, and import the ones worth building on.
desired_chinese: 探索社区共享的产集，从其他研究人员的结构化输出中学习，并导入值得构建的产集。

english: Invite project members into the same research space instead of splitting evidence across chat threads and documents.
desired_chinese: 邀请项目成员进入同一个研究空间，而不是将证据分散在聊天线程和文档中。

english: Work from the same papers, artifacts, and workflow context so handoffs are lighter and decisions stay visible.
desired_chinese: 使用相同的论文、产件和工作流上下文进行工作，以便交接更轻松，决策保持可见。

english: Premium unlocks Team access and higher collaboration limits for advisors, research groups, and co-writing workflows.
desired_chinese: 高级功能解锁团队访问权限和更高的协作限制，适用于顾问、研究小组和共同写作工作流。
结构化的学术阅读与写作

english: From Literature Discovery to First Draft,

desired_chinese: 在一个连续的工作流中

english: Built for academic reading and writing: define purpose, discover papers, read deeply, expand evidence, visualize insights, and draft with structure inside each project.
desired_chinese: 专为学术阅读和写作设计：定义目的，发现论文，深入阅读，扩展证据，可视化洞察，以及在每个项目中用结构化的方式草拟。

english: Make research artifacts persistent, packageable, and shareable
desired_chinese: 使研究产件持久化，可打包，可分享

english: Beyond the workflow itself, Research Workspace includes an artifacts layer that turns working outputs into reusable research assets.
desired_chinese: 除了工作流本身，研究工作空间还包括一个成果层，将工作过程中的产件转变为可重复使用的研究资产。

english: When research is not a solo activity, Team keeps members, papers, artifacts, and writing context inside one shared project space.
desired_chinese: 当研究不再是单打独斗时，团队将成员、论文、产件和写作上下文都保留在一个共享的项目空间内。

english: Free is enough to experience the workflow and artifacts system. Premium is designed for ongoing research that needs multi-project organization, broader package access, and team collaboration.
desired_chinese: 免费版足以体验工作流程和产件系统。高级版设计用于需要多项目组织、更广泛产集访问权限和团队协作的持续研究。

desired_chinese: 用新项目启动你的工作流程

desired_chinese: 首先创建一个项目，然后按顺序进行目的？发现？阅读？扩展？可视化？草稿。所有的论文、产件、笔记和草稿都将保持在项目范围内。

desired_chinese: 免费用户最多可以创建1个项目，不能删除项目，不能使用团队功能，最多可以从社区产集中添加2个产集到我的产集中。高级用户可获得团队访问权限、多项目创建、项目删除以及更高的协作限额。
